Stub functions for BLE HRM support and lifecycle management, and management of Bluetooth persistent storage.


## Files
- **[ble_hrm_stubs.c](ble_hrm_stubs.c.md)**: Stub functions for Bluetooth Low Energy Heart Rate Monitor (BLE HRM) support and lifecycle management.
- **[bluetooth_persistent_storage.c](bluetooth_persistent_storage.c.md)**: Manages Bluetooth persistent storage for BLE and BT Classic pairings, including storing, updating, and deleting pairing data.
